sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82490" key="perifo/rinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιφόρῑνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φορίνη</etym>) <sense id="n82490.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">covered with skin</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χοιρίδια</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:90" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">90</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περίφουρνος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
